name: checkmate
description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice, with deterministic per-row precedent lookup against Spare's entire past-RFP corpus. Bundled MCP server (checkmate-precedents) indexes every answered row from the Spare General Google Drive folder and returns TF-IDF-matched precedents for each new requirement, so every answer is sourced in code rather than prose. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs. Includes an offline index builder for weekly corpus refreshes. Built for the Spare SE team to replace Responsive.
